label: PASS
rationale: The target direct AccessControl.Get requested only column 0x04 (ACL) and returned SUCCESS with no row value. label: FAIL
rationale: The target direct AccessControl.Get requested column 0x04 (ACL) but returned {"ACL":["ACE_DataStore_Get_All"]}.
